tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Sexy Dawg walking bait for covering water quickly in clear water and open areas — big grass flats, rocky points, long casts. That walking action really draws them. Good during shad and herring spawns. Use translucent colors in clear water. Line: mono, not braid, for topwater poppers (14lb small, 17-20lb large).'

knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Summer topwater triggers: bluegill spawn and mayfly hatches. Popper has tremendous drawing power during bluegill spawn — great hook-up ratio even with smallmouth. Use larger popper in wind, dirtier water, or around big bass for more commotion. Fish topwater all day long in summer — produces some of the biggest bass of the year.'
